title: Location
description: Location: Defines a uniquely identifiable point on the Earth in standard global Latitude, Longitude and Elevation, coordinate system. Particularly useful for specifying local climate conditions for environmental analysis.

Latitude.description: Defines North-South position on the Earth. Between -90 to +90 degrees.

Longitude.description: Defines the East-West position on the Earth. Between -180 to +180 degrees.

Elevation.description: The elevation for the location, measured relative to sea level. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

UtcOffset.description: The Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) for the location (in -12 to +14 hours)

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
